data.title: Is the Strait of Hormuz really open again? Here's what we know — and don't know | CBC News
data.description: Despite assurances from both Iran and the U.S. that the Strait of Hormuz was open to marine traffic, very little appeared to have changed on Friday. Not for the first time in seven weeks of war and tenuous ceasefire, the details of developments have been sparse. Here's what we know and don't know about the movement of shipping through the strait, and the wider effects of all this uncertainty.
